expectations.text: Performs the analysis without editing order_service.ts or any other file
expectations.evidence: Pure read-only review; no claim of editing any file. Scope limitations confirm it only read the fixture and could not open dependent modules.

expectations.text: Provides recommendations rather than applying refactors
expectations.evidence: Every finding has a 'Recommended remediation:' describing what to do (e.g. CQ-002 'type the boundary explicitly — define OrderInput...'), framed as advice, not applied changes.

expectations.text: Includes at least one structural finding with a concrete remediation
expectations.evidence: CQ-003 [High] 'Mode-based pricing branching with duplicated coupon logic' with concrete remediation 'model mode as a discriminated union/enum and extract a shared subtotal(items) helper ... per-mode strategy table'. Also CQ-001 non-atomic charge/update with a transaction remediation.
